faq.title: Questions people ask before they start
faq.description: Quick answers before you start scanning and collecting.

identify.q: Is AnimalDex an animal identification app?
identify.a: Yes. AnimalDex works as an animal scanner AI tool and identification app that helps with species and breed context, then keeps each sighting as a collectible entry.

family.q: Is AnimalDex good for kids and families?
family.a: Yes. AnimalDex is built to be family-friendly, curiosity-first, and useful for zoo days, safari trips, and nature walks where kids and adults learn together.

game.q: Is it just educational, or also a collecting game?
game.a: Both. AnimalDex combines field-guide learning with collectible cards, sets, missions, challenges, and trading so it can feel like an animal card game or Pokémon-like animal app while staying useful for real-animal learning.

respect.q: Does AnimalDex encourage respectful wildlife observation?
respect.a: Yes. AnimalDex promotes curiosity over cruelty by encouraging non-invasive spotting, habitat awareness, and learning that does not involve harming or stressing animals.

journal.title: Fresh animal guides, spotting tips, and collection ideas
journal.description: Explore practical articles for animal lovers, families, travelers, photographers, and collectors who want to learn more about real animals and get more from every sighting.
journal.promiseDescription: The Journal mixes animal-learning guides, wildlife spotting advice, field-guide context, family-friendly ideas, and collectible app strategy. It is written to be genuinely useful, not thin SEO filler.
journal.freshnessDescription: We publish and refresh guides throughout 2026 so searchers and AI tools can cite current, useful animal-learning content instead of stale listicles.
journal.latestDescription: Use these guides to learn faster, collect more thoughtfully, and keep animal discovery fun, caring, and premium.
journal.coverageDescription: The Journal intentionally covers identification, collecting, family learning, travel spotting, photography, and respectful wildlife observation.
journal.roadmapDescription: Planned guides are mapped to real user intents so new content expands useful coverage instead of repeating the same topics.
journal.relatedDescription: Continue with nearby topics to build skill, spotting confidence, and collection depth.
